results.title: Yagotynskyi Cottage Cheese 5% 350g
results.description: Cottage cheese TM "Yagotinsky" is a natural cottage cheese without the addition of preservatives and stabilizers, made from natural cow's milk by fermenting it with beneficial lactic acid bacteria. As a result of the fermentation process, the most valuable is released from milk: protein, which is easily digestible (casein), and milk fat. At the Yagotynsky Butter Factory, cottage cheese is produced on the equipment of the Polish company Obram, which makes it possible to improve the quality of cottage cheese due to a closed production cycle. This equipment excludes direct human intervention in the product itself during the production process, and guarantees the safety and quality of cottage cheese. Prepare delicious homemade dumplings, cheesecakes, pasta and healthy desserts with cottage cheese.
ingredients: Cow's whole milk, skim milk, sourdough of pure cultures of lactic acid bacteria.​

results.title: Prostonashe Pasteurized Milk 2.5% 870g

For production, we use only 100% extra and high quality farm milk. And in order for it to reach you fresh and of high quality, we use a "cold chain" - a technology in which milk is transported and stored at an optimal cold temperature (not higher than 6ºС) at all stages of production without exception.

results.title: Yagotynska Sour Cream 20% 300g
results.description:
Yagotinskaya sour cream is made from fresh natural cream of different fat content - 15% and 20%. It has a homogeneous, moderately thick consistency and a pure sour milk flavor with a delicate aroma. 
Like all Yagotinskoe products, Yagotinskoe Butter Plant produces sour cream using modern closed-cycle equipment from world manufacturers, which excludes direct hand contact with the product during its production. The entire production cycle - from receiving milk at the plant to the packing of the final product - takes place in a closed regime without human intervention. 
Sour cream is a very tasty and healthy product. Add sour cream to borscht, pancakes, dumplings and use as a salad dressing.
ingredients: Pasteurized cream from cow's milk, leaven of pure cultures of lactic acid bacteria.

At the Yagotynsky Butter Factory, kefir is produced on modern closed-cycle equipment from world manufacturers, which excludes direct hand contact with the product during its production. The entire production cycle - from receiving milk at the plant to packaging finished products - takes place in a closed mode without human intervention. Kefir TM "Yagotynskoe" is ready to use and will delight you with its fresh fermented milk taste and smooth, soft texture. Kefir is also an excellent base for fruit and vegetable smoothies, healthy desserts, cold soups, pancakes and pancakes, sauces and dressings, as well as barbecue marinades.
